scenes.narration: Sade Sati. Millions of Indians dread it. Astrologers warn about it. Entire industries sell remedies for it. But is it real? Or is it just superstitious nonsense? Let's find out.

First  –  what is it? Sade Sati literally means seven and a half. It is the seven-and-a-half-year period when Saturn transits through your Moon sign and the signs on either side. Three signs in total.

Three signs. Seven and a half years. That means Saturn spends two and a half years in each sign. Now  –  there are twelve signs in the zodiac. Twelve times two and a half is thirty. So if the ancient sages were right  –  Saturn should take around 30 years to complete one full orbit around the zodiac.

Is this accurate? NASA's measured orbital period for Saturn  –  using spacecraft, telescopes, and centuries of modern observation  –  is 29.46 years. The Surya Siddhanta, written over 1,500 years ago without a single telescope, says 29.4. They were right. To 99.8 percent accuracy. With their naked eyes.
scenes.textOverlay:
Surya Siddhanta: 29.4 years
NASA: 29.46 years
99.8% accurate

scenes.narration: No telescopes. No spacecraft. No computers. Just thousands of years of watching the sky. How did they know? That is the question that changes everything. And once you ask it  –  you can never dismiss Vedic astrology again.

textTiming.text: No telescopes. No spacecraft. No computers.

scenes.narration: So what happens during those seven and a half years? The peak  –  phase two  –  is when Saturn sits directly on your Moon. The heaviest planet in the visible sky, pressing down on the seat of your mind. Careers shift. Relationships crack under pressure. Health demands attention. Your identity is stripped to its foundations.

Phase one  –  Saturn enters the sign before your Moon. The pressure builds slowly. Finances tighten. Sleep is disturbed. Hidden anxieties surface. Phase three  –  Saturn moves past your Moon sign. The weight lifts. But you are not the same person. You have been forged. Refined. Made unbreakable.

Sade Sati is not punishment. It is Saturn's forge. And everyone  –  every saint, every leader, every person of substance  –  passed through it. Are you in Sade Sati right now? Find out  –  free  –  at Dekho Panchang.
